prompt: Create a luminous high-resolution anime-style illustration of a young woman standing on an outdoor café terrace on a beautiful fresh-green afternoon, viewed from a high overhead three-quarter angle. She wears a soft cream blouse with delicate ruffles, a pale yellow flowing coat or cardigan blown strongly to the right by the wind, a translucent olive-green layered skirt with floral patterns, gold strappy heeled sandals, and a small ivory chain-strap handbag. Her long light olive-blonde hair streams to the right and gradually dissolves into green halftone tone ribbons, decorated with a small cluster of white flowers and a pale bow near one ear; place a flat beige rectangular censor-like block over the center of her face. The terrace is paved with square gray stone tiles covered in intricate dappled sunlight and leaf shadows, with warm golden light, floating green leaves, and soft bokeh foliage framing the foreground. Include exactly 2 small round white café tables, exactly 3 metal café chairs, exactly 1 cream awning printed with VERDE TERRACE, and exactly 1 black chalkboard menu sign reading Verde Terrace May Special with exactly 5 menu items: Lemon & Herb Soda, Green Salad, Lemon Tart, Herbal Tea, and a small decorative botanical drawing. Add potted greenery, white daisies in a wooden planter, a cup of coffee on the left table, and a glass on the right table. Use delicate linework, transparent fabrics, yellow-green color grading, manga halftone textures blended into the wind and foliage, dreamy soft focus, and an elegant seasonal café atmosphere.
